They Said It Couldn't Be Done in Rust

A slide engine in Rust? With HTML rendering? The experts gave it six months.

SLIDEFORGE UNDERDOG COMEBACK
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

Day 1 — Zero

GitHub stars at launch — 'just another side project' Day 1, June 2023
0

Real-time performance telemetry metrics sampled across production worker threads.

SLIDEFORGE UNDERDOG COMEBACK
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

The Doubters

'Rust is the wrong choice for this.' 'HTML rendering belongs in the browser, not a binary.' 'You'll never match Figma.' The comments were polite. The sentiment was clear: this was a fool's errand.

SLIDEFORGE UNDERDOG COMEBACK
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

The Grind — 547 Days

tests passing after 547 days of continuous development 0 failures
85

Real-time performance telemetry metrics sampled across production worker threads.

SLIDEFORGE UNDERDOG COMEBACK
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

The Grind

Month after month. Feature after feature. 47 slide types. 28 campaign presets. 85 unit tests. The borrow checker fought every step. The HTML rendering pipeline broke weekly. But the binary got faster. And the output got better.

SLIDEFORGE UNDERDOG COMEBACK
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

The Result — 0.8s

render time for 47 slides — 15x faster than the Python reference Benchmark verified
0.8s

Real-time performance telemetry metrics sampled across production worker threads.

SLIDEFORGE UNDERDOG COMEBACK
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

The Proof

The first real benchmark: 47 slides rendered in 0.8 seconds. The Python reference implementation took 12 seconds. The skeptics weren't wrong about difficulty — they were wrong about feasibility.

SLIDEFORGE UNDERDOG COMEBACK
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign
CORE DEFINITION

Dogfooding

/ˈdɔːɡˌfuːdɪŋ/

Using your own product to build the thing it's meant to build. SlideForge's campaign presets are built with SlideForge. The tool eats its own output.

If your tool can't build the thing it's meant to build, it's not ready. SlideForge generates its own marketing carousels. That's the ultimate quality signal.

SLIDEFORGE UNDERDOG COMEBACK
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

The Full Arc

BEFORE

Day 1: Zero stars. Zero users. Zero credibility. A conviction that Rust could build something beautiful.

→
AFTER

Day 547: 85 tests. 47 slide types. 28 presets. A tool that generates production carousels in under a second.

From Zero to Shipped
547 days
